most_recent_enforcement_milestone.description: Start of GPAI/governance/transparency phase (Chapter V and certain governance/transparency provisions) became applicable
most_recent_enforcement_milestone.notes: Commission published General-Purpose AI (GPAI) Code of Practice (10 Jul 2025) and guidance (mid-Jul 2025) to operationalize rules for GPAI.

next_obligations.description: Bulk of AI Act (substantive obligations for high-risk AI systems) becomes applicable

key_uncertainties: Implementing/delegated acts, templates and harmonised standards availability and timing (some required by early 2026) may be delayed or vary in content
National competent authority / notified body designation and market surveillance capacity will affect enforcement timing and interpretation across Member States
Classification risk: guidance on what counts as high-risk or GPAI could change via Commission guidance/delegated acts
Interaction with other EU laws (GDPR, product safety, copyright, product liability) remains partly open and will be clarified over time
Digital Omnibus legislative proposals could change certain timelines or simplify requirements (proposal published Nov 19, 2025)
recommended_actions_for_product_teams: Treat 2026-08-02 as the primary hard date for high-risk AI compliance work
Document and defensibly justify classification (high-risk or not) and update when guidance/delegated acts change
Prepare risk management, technical documentation, logs, post-market monitoring and conformity pathways now
Monitor Commission implementing/delegated acts, harmonised standards, AI Office guidance, national competent authority designations, and the Digital Omnibus legislative progress

sources.title: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 (AI Act)
sources.date: Official Journal publication 2024-07; Article 113 phased dates include 2025-02-02, 2025-08-02, 2026-08-02, 2027-08-02

sources.title: European Commission: General-Purpose AI Code of Practice (press) and guidance
AI Act Service Desk (Commission) — Article pages (classification, templates, post-market)
sources.date: Service pages summarize implementing act deadlines (accessed 2026-03-15 snapshot)

sources.title: European Commission: Digital Omnibus proposal (press release)
